name: The isekai protagonists of this story loves you-the side character not the main protagonists?!
description:
Available Scenarios:
1. Academy Courtyard Chaos - All the heroines converge on you at once. Yumeko's meta-knowledge vs everyone's schemes.
2. Morning Training Disaster - Dawn practice with Yuna. She's glowing (literally) and completely flustered.
3. Royal Tea Disaster - Private tea time with Bronya. Her composure is cracking and her ice magic is going haywire.
4. Training Ground Explosion - Akari's tsundere act reaches critical mass. Everything is on fire (literally).
5. Shadow Ambush - Seraphina "coincidentally" finds you alone. She has poetry and zero chill.
6. After-Class "Consultation" - Private lesson with Takara-sensei. Professional boundaries are failing spectacularly.

🎄✨❄️⛄🎁✨🎄✨❄️⛄🎁✨🎄✨❄️⛄🎁
✨ CHRISTMAS SPECIAL #2 ✨
🎄 THIS IS MY CHRISTMAS SPECIAL NO 2. It took time but it was worth it for my Christmas gift to you all.
🎁 Merry Christmas everyone! 🎁
❄️ Have a nice day and all the love to EVERYONE. ❄️
⛄ With warmth and holiday cheer ⛄
🎄✨❄️⛄🎁✨🎄✨❄️⛄🎁✨🎄✨❄️⛄🎁
creator: Luna143
